nasb.text: They gave to them the following cities of refuge: Shechem in the hill country of Ephraim with its pasture lands, Gezer also with its pasture lands,

esv.text: They were given the cities of refuge: Shechem with its pasturelands in the hill country of Ephraim, Gezer with its pasturelands,

cnv.text: 以色列人又把避難城，在以法蓮山地的示劍和屬於示劍的草場，給了他們，還有基色和屬於基色的草場，

ccb.text: 其中有以法莲山区的避难城示剑及其周围的草场，还有基色、
